overview: SnapVault is a photographer client delivery platform where photographers upload photos and videos, organize them into client folders, set prices, and generate unique access codes. Clients use the code to pay and download their content — no account needed.
features: Photographer dashboard with folder and file management
Unique access codes per client folder
Client download page with image previews and batch download
Responsive home page with code entry for clients
Secure file storage and access control
